cards.hook: They built an AI that reads game news so you don't
cards.caption:
They built an AI that reads game news so you don't.

Auto-classifying gaming headlines is a real problem worth solving. This is the kind of build my feed surfaces before the timeline does.
cards.stance: Manual news-scrolling for gamers is already dead; the tooling just hasn't caught up.

cards.hook: "Just a transformation" — devs say the industry is on fire
cards.caption:
"Just a transformation," the creators said. Devs said the industry is on fire.

Who makes the games after the AI tools dust off? The debate my feed keeps while the timeline argues past it.
cards.stance: AI didn't transform game dev, it detonated the job market and called it progress.

cards.hook: "Metroid: Ravenous" just leaked via a ratings board
cards.caption:
"Metroid: Ravenous" just leaked through Brazil's ratings board — before any official reveal.

Ratings-board leaks are how the real news breaks. Found in my feed before the timeline noticed.
cards.stance: Ratings boards leak more games than publishers ever announce on purpose.

cards.hook: Aliens: Fireteam Elite 2 just got its reveal trailer
cards.caption:
Aliens: Fireteam Elite 2 just dropped its official reveal trailer via IGN.

Cold Iron is back in the Xenomorph business. The reveal my feed caught the moment it went live.
cards.stance: Co-op Aliens shooters are the most underrated genre in gaming right now.

cards.hook: Sony's already repurposing its PS disc factory
cards.caption:
Rumor: Sony is repurposing its PlayStation disc factory, and Microsoft is lining up buyers for Xbox studios.

The consoles-are-dying signal, surfaced in my feed early.
cards.stance: Physical media is over — Sony and Microsoft are just done pretending otherwise.
